episodes.title: Bondi testifies about Epstein files
episodes.description: Former U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi was in the hot seat Friday. She faced questions from lawmakers about how the U.S. Department of Justice handled the Jeffrey Epstein files.

episodes.title: 16 Epstein files, including Trump photo, disappear from DOJ website: Report
episodes.description: (The Hill) -- At least 16 files on the Justice Department's (DOJ) webpage containing files on Jeffrey Epstein, including a photo featuring two pictures of President Trump, were found to have disappeared from the department's website as of Saturday, The Associated Press reported.
